MODULE: cosmos.core.nlp.task_classifier
FILE: cosmos/core/nlp/task_classifier.py (225 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Task Classifier for Natural Language Commands.

Classifies parsed intents into task categories for routing.

CLASSES:
- TaskType(Enum): Task categories for routing.
- Classification: Classification result.
- TaskClassifier: Classify intents into task types for routing.

Routes crypto operations to Bankr
  Methods: def classify(self, intent: Intent) -> Classification
  Methods: def get_handler_type(self, classification: Classification) -> str
